summary: Post-refactoring regression testing complete. All 32 tests pass after monolith server.py (1246 lines) was split into database.py, config.py, auth_utils.py, routes/auth.py, routes/chat.py, routes/tts.py, routes/payments.py, routes/bookings.py. New server.py is 84 lines. All endpoints work identically to pre-refactoring.
critical_code_review_comments: database.py reads MONGO_URL and DB_NAME at import time — if env vars are missing at startup, it will fail fast (correct behavior)
chat.py uses in-memory chat_histories dict — resets on server restart, by design
server.py CORS middleware is registered AFTER include_router — in Starlette/FastAPI this is acceptable since middleware runs on all requests regardless of order
auth_utils.py: get_current_user() supports both cookie and Bearer token — dual-mode auth is clean
config.py SYSTEM_PROMPT is 300+ lines — acceptable as config constant, not logic
All route modules cleanly import from database, auth_utils, config — no circular imports
seed_data_creation: Guest and fresh users created during tests; admin seeded on startup

mocked_apis.stripe_webhooks: MOCKED — Stripe webhook verification not fully tested (test mode only)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9 verified post-refactoring backend. All 32 tests pass: auth guest/register/login/me/logout, problems (10 categories), tariffs (test/hour/week/month with correct prices), specialists (miron_shakira), booking slots (21 weekdays, 4 time slots each), my bookings, chat history + sessions, user voice/language settings persistence, payments test-tariff activation and double-use protection. Backend starts cleanly (supervisor logs show 'Miro.Care backend started'). Stripe paid tariffs not tested (would require real Stripe session). Frontend not tested per request.

endpoints_tested.backend_startup: PASS — supervisor logs show clean startup
